name: SS-31
subtitle: Mitochondrial-Targeted Peptide | Cardiolipin Protector

modifications: Selectively binds cardiolipin in inner mitochondrial membrane

overview: SS-31 (Elamipretide) is an aromatic-cationic tetrapeptide that selectively binds to cardiolipin in the inner mitochondrial membrane, preventing lipid peroxidation and optimizing electron transport chain function for enhanced cellular energy production.
mechanism: Selectively binds to cardiolipin in inner mitochondrial membrane, preventing lipid peroxidation and optimizing electron transport chain function. This improves ATP production and reduces oxidative damage at the mitochondrial level.
keyBenefits: Excellent safety profile in clinical trials

items.name: Enhanced ATP Production
items.description: Optimizes electron transport chain function for improved cellular energy.

items.name: Oxidative Stress Reduction
items.description: Prevents cardiolipin peroxidation and reduces mitochondrial oxidative damage.

items.name: Mitochondrial Disease Support
items.description: Significant improvements in 6-minute walk test and fatigue scores in PMM patients.

items.name: Cardiac Protection
items.description: Reduces cardiac injury markers and improves mitochondrial function in surgical patients.

items.name: Heart Failure Support
items.description: Reduces ischemia-reperfusion injury and supports cardiac function.

items.name: Exercise Tolerance
items.description: Enhanced exercise capacity and reduced fatigue.

items.name: Age-Related Muscle Function
items.description: Reversed age-related decline in muscle function in animal studies.

items.name: Cognitive Protection
items.description: Neuroprotective effects demonstrated in Alzheimer's models.

items.name: Cellular Rejuvenation
items.description: Supports overall cellular health through mitochondrial optimization.

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous or intravenous injection. SS-31 dissolves readily and should be protected from light due to photosensitivity.

steps: Optional: sterile filtration for IV use
Protect from light - use amber vials if available

deliveryMethods.overview: Topical cream/gel formulation available with limited research data. Used primarily for anti-aging skin applications.

interactions.notes: Both support mitochondrial function through different mechanisms.
Both are mitochondrial peptides with complementary mechanisms.
May work together to protect cellular function.
BPC-157 focuses on tissue repair while SS-31 targets cellular energetics.

timeline.effects: Improved stamina, clearer thinking, better sleep

common: Excellent safety profile in clinical trials
No significant side effects reported at therapeutic doses
Safe for long-term use based on current data

good: Pharmaceutical grade (>98% purity required for clinical applications)
warning: Light sensitive - protect from exposure using amber vials
bad: Yellow or brown discoloration indicates degradation

references.title: Primary Mitochondrial Myopathy Phase 2 Trial
references.keyFindings: 40mg daily for 12 weeks in 36 patients showed significant improvements in 6-minute walk test and fatigue scores with excellent safety profile.

references.title: Cardioprotection in Heart Failure Study
references.keyFindings: 0.25mg/kg/hr infusion during cardiac surgery reduced cardiac injury markers and improved mitochondrial function.

references.title: Age-Related Muscle Dysfunction Study
references.keyFindings: 8 weeks in aged mice reversed age-related decline in muscle function, increased ATP production, and reduced oxidative stress.

references.title: Barth Syndrome Clinical Trial
references.keyFindings: Phase 3 trial with 40mg daily for 48 weeks showed trends toward cardiac improvement in this rare mitochondrial disorder.

latestResearch.title: COVID-19 Cardiac Injury Protection
latestResearch.summary: Potential cardioprotective effects in COVID-related cardiac injury.

latestResearch.title: Neuroprotective Effects in Alzheimer's
latestResearch.summary: Demonstrated neuroprotective effects in Alzheimer's disease models.

latestResearch.title: Kidney Protection in Acute Injury
latestResearch.summary: Renal protective effects in acute kidney injury models.

quickStats.frequency: Once daily (morning or pre-workout for athletic use)
quickStats.storage: Reconstituted: 2-8°C in amber/dark vials, use within 30 days. Light sensitive
